title: Immediate Hiring!!! Electronics Quality Inspector - AWS + VB / West
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Visually inspect electronic components before shipment, verifying part accuracy, part numbers, quantities, and checking for any damage.

  • Interpret specification sheets and technical documentation.

  • Generate detailed discrepancy and inspection reports.

  • Perform tape and reel operations as required.

  • Collaborate with procurement specialists and account representatives to resolve material issues.

  • Conduct functional testing of electronic components and systems using specialized equipment.

  • Stay current with industry standards and regulatory changes related to electronic component inspection.

  • Participate in continuous improvement initiatives to enhance product quality and operational efficiency.

Requirements:

  • Minimum 1 year of experience in a similar inspection role.

  • Experience in the electronics industry is a plus.

  • Ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment.

  • Knowledge of precision measuring devices is a plus.

  • Detail-oriented with a focus on accuracy and precision.

  • Able to work independently and collaboratively as part of a team.

    HOW TO APPLY:

    Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” and provide the below details in your resume.

    We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

    Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

    Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

    Trust Recruit Pte Ltd

    EA License No: 19C9950

    EA Personnel: Ang Ren Jing (Dino)

    EA Personnel Reg No: R25146829

Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
